testCases.title: Verify that login handles username with single character

steps.action: Enter username "A" in the username field
steps.expected: Single character username should be entered

steps.action: Enter password "admin123" in the password field

steps.expected: Login request should be submitted for authentication

steps.action: Verify invalid credentials error message is displayed
steps.expected: Error message "Invalid credentials" should be displayed

steps.action: Verify user remains on login page
steps.expected: User should not be redirected to dashboard
